name: io.github.outscraper/outscraper-mcp-server
title: Outscraper MCP Server
description: Official Outscraper MCP server for businesses, Google Maps, company insights, contacts, balance, and async request lifecycle tools.

environmentVariables.name: CLOUD_SERVICE
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to require the API key from Authorization or X-API-KEY headers in HTTP mode

environmentVariables.name: HTTP_STREAMABLE_SERVER
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to run the server over stateless Streamable HTTP instead of stdio

environmentVariables.name: SSE_LOCAL
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to run a local stateful HTTP/SSE mode with session management

environmentVariables.name: HTTP_STATEFUL_SERVER
environmentVariables.description: Alternative flag for enabling stateful HTTP session mode

environmentVariables.name: HOST
environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind host used when HTTP_STREAMABLE_SERVER=true

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: HTTP bind port used when HTTP_STREAMABLE_SERVER=true
